runs.final_dockerfile:
# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build MPAndroidChart (MPChartLib + MPChartExample) from source
FROM circleci/android:api-28 AS builder

# Ensure we run as root for installation tasks
USER root

# Android SDK environment
ENV ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_HOME}
ENV PATH=${PATH}:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools/bin:${ANDROID_HOME}/platform-tools

# Prepare workspace and dependencies
WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy source code into the image
COPY . /workspace

# Ensure Gradle wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Provide local properties so Gradle can find the SDK (use the image's default SDK path if present)
RUN mkdir -p "$ANDROID_HOME" && echo "sdk.dir=$ANDROID_HOME" > local.properties

# Build the project from source (builds both MPChartLib and MPChartExample via the Gradle wrapper)
RUN ./gradlew build

# Collect APKs into a single artifacts directory inside the builder
RUN mkdir -p /workspace/apk
RUN sh -lc 'for f in $(find . -name "*.apk" 2>/dev/null); do cp "$f" /workspace/apk/; done' || true

# Stage 2: runtime container with artifacts only
FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS runtime

# Create directory for APKs
RUN mkdir -p /app/apk

# Copy built APKs from the builder stage (robust against folder structure)
COPY --from=builder /workspace/apk/ /app/apk/

WORKDIR /app

# Default command: list APKs if present
CMD ["bash","-lc","ls -la /app/apk || true && echo APK artifacts available in /app/apk"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM gradle:jdk25 AS builder

# Install required system dependencies for Android SDK and build
USER root
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        wget \
        unzip \
        git \
        curl \
        ca-certificates \
        build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Android SDK setup
ENV ANDROID_HOME=/usr/local/android-sdk
ENV PATH=${PATH}:/usr/local/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/tools/bin:/usr/local/android-sdk/tools:/usr/local/android-sdk/platform-tools

RUN mkdir -p "$ANDROID_HOME"/cmdline-tools && \
    mkdir -p /tmp/sdk && \
    cd /tmp/sdk && \
    curl -o /tmp/sdk/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip && \
    unzip -o /tmp/sdk/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip -d "$ANDROID_HOME"/cmdline-tools && \
    mv "$ANDROID_HOME"/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools "$ANDROID_HOME"/cmdline-tools/tools && \
    chmod -R 755 "$ANDROID_HOME" && \
    yes | "$ANDROID_HOME"/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager --sdk_root="$ANDROID_HOME" --licenses && \
    "$ANDROID_HOME"/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager --sdk_root="$ANDROID_HOME" \
      'platform-tools' \
      'build-tools;28.0.3' \
      'platforms;android-28'

# Copy source and build
COPY . /workspace
WORKDIR /workspace

# Build the project using the Gradle wrapper
RUN ./gradlew build

# Final runtime image
FROM gradle:jdk25

# Copy built artifacts and Android SDK from builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace /workspace
COPY --from=builder /usr/local/android-sdk /usr/local/android-sdk
WORKDIR /workspace

ENV ANDROID_HOME=/usr/local/android-sdk
ENV PATH=${PATH}:/usr/local/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/tools/bin:/usr/local/android-sdk/tools:/usr/local/android-sdk/platform-tools

# Default command keeps the container running
CMD ["bash"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM gradle:jdk17 AS builder

# Install required system dependencies for Android SDK and build
USER root
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        wget \
        unzip \
        git \
        curl \
        ca-certificates \
        build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Android SDK setup
ENV ANDROID_HOME=/usr/local/android-sdk
ENV PATH=${PATH}:/usr/local/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/tools/bin:/usr/local/android-sdk/tools:/usr/local/android-sdk/platform-tools

RUN mkdir -p "$ANDROID_HOME"/cmdline-tools && \
    mkdir -p /tmp/sdk && \
    cd /tmp/sdk && \
    curl -L -o /tmp/sdk/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip && \
    unzip -o /tmp/sdk/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip -d "$ANDROID_HOME"/cmdline-tools && \
    mv "$ANDROID_HOME"/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools "$ANDROID_HOME"/cmdline-tools/tools && \
    chmod -R 755 "$ANDROID_HOME" && \
    yes | "$ANDROID_HOME"/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager --sdk_root="$ANDROID_HOME" --licenses && \
    "$ANDROID_HOME"/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager --sdk_root="$ANDROID_HOME" \
      'platform-tools' \
      'build-tools;28.0.3' \
      'platforms;android-28'

# Copy source and build
COPY . /workspace
WORKDIR /workspace

# Build the project using the Gradle wrapper
RUN ./gradlew build

# Final runtime image
FROM gradle:jdk17

# Copy built artifacts and Android SDK from builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace /workspace
COPY --from=builder /usr/local/android-sdk /usr/local/android-sdk
WORKDIR /workspace

ENV ANDROID_HOME=/usr/local/android-sdk
ENV PATH=${PATH}:/usr/local/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/tools/bin:/usr/local/android-sdk/tools:/usr/local/android-sdk/platform-tools

# Default command keeps the container running
CMD ["bash"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM circleci/android:api-28 AS builder

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the project and build from source
COPY . .

# Ensure Gradle wrapper is executable and build the project (APK will be produced)
RUN chmod +x ./gradlew && ./gradlew build -x test

# Final runtime image (contains built artifacts in the workspace)
FROM openjdk:17-jdk-slim

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy built artifacts from builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace /workspace

# Default command for debugging; APKs can be found under MPChartExample/build/outputs/apk
CMD ["bash"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM circleci/android:api-28 AS builder

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the project and build from source
COPY . .

# Ensure Gradle wrapper is executable and build the project (APK will be produced)
RUN chmod +x ./gradlew && ./gradlew assembleDebug -x test

# Final runtime image (contains built artifacts in the workspace)
FROM alpine:3.18 AS runtime

RUN apk add --no-cache bash

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy built APKs from builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/MPChartExample/build/outputs/apk /workspace/apk

CMD ["bash", "-lc", "echo APKs available at /workspace/apk; ls -la /workspace/apk || true"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM circleci/android:api-28 AS builder

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the project and build from source
COPY . .

# Build the project (APK will be produced). We skip tests for speed.
RUN ./gradlew assembleDebug -x test

# Copy APKs to a separate directory for runtime inspection
RUN mkdir -p /workspace/apk
RUN bash -lc "for f in MPChartExample/build/outputs/apk/**/*.apk; do [ -f \"$f\" ] && cp \"$f\" /workspace/apk/; done || true"

# Final runtime image (artifact hosting only)
FROM alpine:3.18

RUN apk add --no-cache bash

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy built APKs from builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/apk /apk

CMD ["bash","-lc","ls -la /apk || true"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM gradle:jdk17 AS builder

# Install required system dependencies for Android SDK and build
USER root
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        curl \
        ca-certificates \
        unzip \
        wget \
        git \
        build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Android SDK setup using sdk-tools (sdk-tools-linux-4333796.zip)
ENV ANDROID_HOME=/usr/local/android-sdk
ENV PATH=${PATH}:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools/bin:${ANDROID_HOME}/platform-tools

RUN mkdir -p "$ANDROID_HOME" && \
    mkdir -p /tmp/sdk-tools && \
    cd /tmp/sdk-tools && \
    curl -fsSL -o sdk-tools-linux.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/sdk-tools-linux-4333796.zip && \
    unzip -q sdk-tools-linux.zip -d "$ANDROID_HOME" && \
    rm sdk-tools-linux.zip && \
    yes | "$ANDROID_HOME"/tools/bin/sdkmanager --licenses && \
    "$ANDROID_HOME"/tools/bin/sdkmanager --sdk_root="$ANDROID_HOME" \
      'platform-tools' \
      'build-tools;28.0.3' \
      'platforms;android-28'

# Copy source and build
COPY . /workspace
WORKDIR /workspace

# Build the project using the Gradle wrapper
RUN ./gradlew build -x test

# Final runtime image (artifact hosting only)
FROM alpine:3.18

RUN apk add --no-cache bash

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy built APKs and Android SDK from builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace /workspace
COPY --from=builder /usr/local/android-sdk /usr/local/android-sdk

ENV ANDROID_HOME=/usr/local/android-sdk
ENV PATH=${PATH}:/usr/local/android-sdk/tools:/usr/local/android-sdk/tools/bin:/usr/local/android-sdk/platform-tools

CMD ["bash"]
"}

iterations.injected_lessons:
1. **Invalid base image tag (`gradle:jdk25`)**  
   - **What failed:** Docker Hub has no `gradle:jdk25` (Java 25 is unreleased). Build stopped immediately.  
   - **Fix:** Use stable tags such as `gradle:jdk17` or, for Android builds, `cimg/android:2023.09` or `circleci/android:api-33`. Verify tags exist via `docker pull` first.

2. **Oversized image from embedding Android SDK**  
   - **What failed:** The first `gradle:jdk17` attempt installed full Android SDK and copied it into the final stage, causing image bloat and slow builds.  
   - **Fix:** Use a multi‑stage build:  
     - Stage 1 — build with Android tools (`cimg/android` or `gradle:jdk17` + SDK).  
     - Stage 2 — copy only the built artifacts (APKs) into a minimal base (`debian:bookworm-slim` or similar).  
     - Never copy SDK, emulator, or gradle caches to the runtime image.

3. **Missing or non‑executable Gradle wrapper (`./gradlew`)**  
   - **What failed:** Steps that ran `./gradlew assembleRelease` failed when the wrapper script wasn’t marked `+x`.  
   - **Fix:** Add `RUN chmod +x gradlew` before running any Gradle command. Confirm the file exists at the project root.

4. **Incorrect or assumed APK path**  
   - **What failed:** Lines like `COPY --from=builder /workspace/MPChartExample/build/outputs/apk /app` failed when the module path didn’t match.  
   - **Fix:** After building, use `RUN find . -name "*.apk"` to confirm path. Copy artifacts dynamically (e.g., `COPY --from=builder /workspace/**/outputs/apk /app/apk`). Avoid hard‑coded module names.

5. **Missing base image (`openjdk:17-jdk-slim`) in later multi‑stage copy**  
   - **What failed:** Docker Hub lookup error “base image not found,” due to referencing `openjdk:17-jdk-slim` in a FROM statement not available when using CircleCI images.  
   - **Fix:** Use consistent, available base images across stages; for example:  
     - `FROM cimg/android:2023.09 AS builder`  
     - `FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS runtime`.

6. **ABI mismatch between builder and runtime (glibc vs musl)**  
   - **What failed:** Final stage used `alpine`, but Android SDK tools require glibc (Debian‑based). Result: runtime linking errors.  
   - **Fix:** Use Debian/Ubuntu‑based runtime (`debian:bookworm-slim`) instead of Alpine when copying files from glibc‑based builder images.

7. **APT commands and cleanup**  
   - **What failed:** Some `RUN apt-get update` chains were incomplete or left caches, increasing size.  
   - **Fix:** Use `RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y <packages> && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*` to keep images clean; install only essentials needed for the build (e.g., `wget`, `unzip`, `lib32stdc++6`).

8. **Image verification process**  
   - **Observation:** Multiple VerifyBuild failures stemmed from base image/tag errors, wrong file paths, or missing permissions.  
   - **Fix:** Test base image locally with `docker run -it <image> bash` before full build. Validate Gradle wrapper execution and APK output paths inside the container first.

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build MPAndroidChart (MPChartLib + MPChartExample) from source
FROM gradle:jdk17 AS builder

# Android SDK env
ENV ANDROID_HOME=/usr/local/android-sdk
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_HOME}
ENV PATH=${PATH}:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools/bin:${ANDROID_HOME}/platform-tools

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends wget unzip git curl ca-certificates build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Android CLI tools
RUN mkdir -p "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools" && \
    wget -q https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip -O /tmp/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip && \
    unzip -q /tmp/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip -d "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools" && \
    mv "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools" "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/tools" && \
    yes | "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager" --sdk_root="${ANDROID_HOME}" "platform-tools" "build-tools;28.0.3" "platforms;android-28" && \
    rm -f /tmp/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip

# Accept licenses
RUN yes | "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager" --sdk_root="${ANDROID_HOME}" --licenses

# Copy source
COPY . /workspace
WORKDIR /workspace

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build
RUN ./gradlew build

# Stage 2: runtime container with artifacts only
FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS runtime

ENV APK_DIR=/app/apk
RUN mkdir -p "$APK_DIR"

# Copy built APKs from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/MPChartExample/build/outputs/apk "$APK_DIR"

WORKDIR /app

# Default command: list APKs
CMD ["bash","-lc","echo \"APK artifacts (if any) are under /app/apk\"; ls -la /app/apk || true"]"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build MPAndroidChart (MPChartLib + MPChartExample) from source
FROM cimg/android:2023.09 AS builder

# Android SDK env
ENV ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_HOME}
ENV PATH=${PATH}:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools/bin:${ANDROID_HOME}/platform-tools

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends wget unzip git curl ca-certificates build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create sdk dir and install platform-tools/build-tools
RUN mkdir -p "${ANDROID_HOME}" && \
    yes | sdkmanager --sdk_root="${ANDROID_HOME}" --licenses

# Copy source
COPY . /workspace
WORKDIR /workspace

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build
RUN ./gradlew build

# Stage 2: runtime container with artifacts only
FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS runtime

# Create directory for APKs
RUN mkdir -p /app/apk

# Copy built APKs from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/MPChartExample/build/outputs/apk /app/apk

WORKDIR /app

# Default command: list APKs if present
CMD ["bash","-lc","echo \"APK artifacts (if any) are under /app/apk\"; ls -la /app/apk || true"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build MPAndroidChart (MPChartLib + MPChartExample) from source
FROM cimg/android:2023.09 AS builder

# Ensure we are running as root for package installation
USER root

# Android SDK env
ENV ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_HOME}
ENV PATH=${PATH}:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools/bin:${ANDROID_HOME}/platform-tools

# Install build essentials and basic tools
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends wget unzip git curl ca-certificates build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Android CLI tools and platform components (non-interactive licenses)
RUN mkdir -p "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools" && \
    wget -q https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip -O /tmp/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip && \
    unzip -q /tmp/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip -d "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools" && \
    mv "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools" "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/tools" && \
    yes | "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager" --sdk_root="${ANDROID_HOME}" "platform-tools" "build-tools;28.0.3" "platforms;android-28" && \
    rm -f /tmp/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip

# Accept licenses non-interactively
RUN yes | "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager" --sdk_root="${ANDROID_HOME}" --licenses

# Copy source into the container
COPY . /workspace
WORKDIR /workspace

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build
RUN ./gradlew build

# Stage 2: runtime container with artifacts only
FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS runtime

# Create directory for APKs
RUN mkdir -p /app/apk

# Copy built APKs from the builder stage (static path)
COPY --from=builder /workspace/MPChartExample/build/outputs/apk /app/apk

WORKDIR /app

# Default command: list APKs if present
CMD ["bash","-lc","echo \"APK artifacts (if any) are under /app/apk\"; ls -la /app/apk || true"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build MPAndroidChart (MPChartLib + MPChartExample) from source
FROM circleci/android:api-28 AS builder

# Ensure we are running as root for package installation
USER root

# Android SDK env
ENV ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_HOME}
ENV PATH=${PATH}:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools/bin:${ANDROID_HOME}/platform-tools

# Install build essentials and basic tools
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends wget unzip git curl ca-certificates build-essential && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Android CLI tools and platform components (non-interactive licenses)
RUN mkdir -p "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools" && \
    wget -q https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip -O /tmp/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip && \
    unzip -q /tmp/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip -d "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools" && \
    mv "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools" "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/tools" && \
    yes | "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager" --sdk_root="${ANDROID_HOME}" "platform-tools" "build-tools;28.0.3" "platforms;android-28" && \
    rm -f /tmp/commandlinetools-linux_latest.zip

# Accept licenses non-interactively
RUN yes | "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager" --sdk_root="${ANDROID_HOME}" --licenses

# Copy source into the container
COPY . /workspace
WORKDIR /workspace

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build
RUN ./gradlew build

# Stage 2: runtime container with artifacts only
FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS runtime

# Create directory for APKs
RUN mkdir -p /app/apk

# Copy built APKs from the builder stage (static path)
COPY --from=builder /workspace/MPChartExample/build/outputs/apk /app/apk

WORKDIR /app

# Default command: list APKs if present
CMD ["bash","-lc","echo \"APK artifacts (if any) are under /app/apk\"; ls -la /app/apk || true"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build MPAndroidChart (MPChartLib + MPChartExample) from source
FROM cimg/android:2023.09 AS builder

# Use root for package management steps if needed
USER root

# Android SDK environment
ENV ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_HOME}
ENV PATH=${PATH}:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools/bin:${ANDROID_HOME}/platform-tools

# Copy source
COPY . /workspace
WORKDIR /workspace

# Ensure Gradle wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Attempt to prepare Android SDK components if sdkmanager is available in the base image
RUN if [ -x "${ANDROID_HOME}/tools/bin/sdkmanager" ]; then \
      yes | "${ANDROID_HOME}/tools/bin/sdkmanager" --sdk_root="$ANDROID_HOME" "platform-tools" "build-tools;28.0.3" "platforms;android-28"; \
    elif [ -x "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager" ]; then \
      yes | "${ANDROID_HOME}/cmdline-tools/tools/bin/sdkmanager" --sdk_root="$ANDROID_HOME" "platform-tools" "build-tools;28.0.3" "platforms;android-28"; \
    else \
      echo "sdkmanager not found; proceeding without explicit SDK installation"; \
    fi

# Build the project (including MPChartLib and MPChartExample via Gradle wrapper)
RUN ./gradlew build

# Collect APKs into a single artifacts directory inside the builder
RUN mkdir -p /workspace/apk
RUN bash -lc 'for f in $(find . -name "*.apk"); do cp "$f" /workspace/apk/; done' || true

# Stage 2: runtime container with artifacts only
FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS runtime

# Create directory for APKs
RUN mkdir -p /app/apk

# Copy built APKs from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/apk/ /app/apk/

WORKDIR /app

# Default command: list APKs if present
CMD ["bash","-lc","ls -la /app/apk || true && echo APK artifacts available in /app/apk"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build MPAndroidChart (MPChartLib + MPChartExample) from source
FROM circleci/android:api-28 AS builder

# Ensure we run as root for installation tasks
USER root

# Android SDK environment
ENV ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_HOME}
ENV PATH=${PATH}:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools/bin:${ANDROID_HOME}/platform-tools

# Prepare workspace and dependencies
WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy source code into the image
COPY . /workspace

# Ensure Gradle wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Provide local properties so Gradle can find the SDK (use the image's default SDK path if present)
RUN mkdir -p "$ANDROID_HOME" && echo "sdk.dir=$ANDROID_HOME" > local.properties

# Build the project from source (builds both MPChartLib and MPChartExample via the Gradle wrapper)
RUN ./gradlew build

artifacts.content:
# Multi-stage Dockerfile to build MPAndroidChart (MPChartLib + MPChartExample) from source
FROM circleci/android:api-28 AS builder

# Ensure we run as root for installation tasks
USER root

# Android SDK environment
ENV ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk
ENV ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_HOME}
ENV PATH=${PATH}:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools:${ANDROID_HOME}/tools/bin:${ANDROID_HOME}/platform-tools

# Prepare workspace and dependencies
WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy source code into the image
COPY . /workspace

# Ensure Gradle wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Provide local properties so Gradle can find the SDK (use the image's default SDK path if present)
RUN mkdir -p "$ANDROID_HOME" && echo "sdk.dir=$ANDROID_HOME" > local.properties

# Build the project from source (builds both MPChartLib and MPChartExample via the Gradle wrapper)
RUN ./gradlew build

# Collect APKs into a single artifacts directory inside the builder
RUN mkdir -p /workspace/apk
RUN sh -lc 'for f in $(find . -name "*.apk" 2>/dev/null); do cp "$f" /workspace/apk/; done' || true

# Stage 2: runtime container with artifacts only
FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS runtime

# Create directory for APKs
RUN mkdir -p /app/apk

# Copy built APKs from the builder stage (robust against folder structure)
COPY --from=builder /workspace/apk/ /app/apk/

WORKDIR /app

# Default command: list APKs if present
CMD ["bash","-lc","ls -la /app/apk || true && echo APK artifacts available in /app/apk"]
